title: Alternatives to Gumroad's Payout Delays: What Nobody Tells You Before You Choose — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: Imagine you're a Nigerian digital creator, pouring your heart and soul into an ebook or course. You've finally got a buyer from a restricted country, but PayPal's restrictions block your payment. The email from Gumroad arrives, 'We've delayed your payment due to security concerns.' The frustration is real. You've invested too much time and energy to let a payment delay ruin your momentum. It's not just about the money; it's about the trust with your audience and the validation of your work. What if you could sell without the risk of delayed payments or the need for PayPal? Let's explore the alternatives to Gumroad's payout delays, with no PayPal required.
What Each Option Actually Offers

Gumroad, Payhip, and Stripe all promise to help you sell digital products, but what do they actually deliver? Gumroad's delayed payments are the tip of the iceberg. Their fees can range from 3.5% to 8.5% + $0.30 per transaction, depending on the country. Payhip's fees are slightly lower, but they still charge a flat rate of 2.9% + $0.30 per transaction. Stripe, on the other hand, charges a flat rate of 2.9% + $0.30 per transaction, but their fees can add up quickly due to their complex pricing structure. Meanwhile, NOWPayments offers a flat rate of 1% + $0.25 per transaction, with no hidden fees or delayed payments.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

When it comes to restricted countries, Gumroad and Payhip have a one-size-fits-all approach. They block payments from countries like Nigeria, Ghana, and Kenya, citing security concerns. Stripe, while not entirely blocked, has complex requirements for restricted countries, making it difficult to navigate. NOWPayments, on the other hand, has no restrictions on countries. You can sell to anyone, anywhere, without worrying about payment delays or blocked accounts.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

Payment speed is crucial for digital creators. Gumroad's delayed payments can take anywhere from a few days to several weeks. Payhip's fees may be lower, but they can still add up quickly. Stripe's fees are competitive, but their complex pricing structure can make it difficult to budget. NOWPayments offers fast payments, with funds arriving in your wallet within minutes, not days. Their flat rate of 1% + $0.25 per transaction makes it easy to budget and plan for your sales.
Delayed payments can kill your momentum as a digital creator.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

Automation is key to streamlining your sales process. Gumroad and Payhip offer limited automation capabilities, requiring manual intervention for each sale. Stripe has more advanced automation features, but they can be complex to set up. NOWPayments offers seamless automation, with automated delivery and payment verification. Their Admin Dashboard provides real-time analytics and transaction logs, making it easy to track your sales and optimize your strategy.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

Ultimately, the choice depends on your specific needs and goals. If you're looking for a simple, low-fee solution with no restrictions, NOWPayments is the clear winner. Their flat rate of 1% + $0.25 per transaction, combined with their automated delivery and payment verification, makes them the perfect choice for digital creators. With NOWPayments, you can focus on what matters most – creating amazing content for your audience.
How do I sell digital products if PayPal is not available in my country?

The direct answer is NOWPayments combined with the Core Shop Engine. NOWPayments is a crypto payment processor that requires no KYC from merchants and no account creation from buyers. It supports over 300 coins and sends a webhook to your backend when a payment confirms on-chain. The Core Shop Engine receives that webhook, verifies the transaction, generates a receipt, and delivers the product automatically. The key difference between this and a platform workaround is that it is not a workaround — it is a different infrastructure layer entirely. There is no platform that can suspend your access, no compliance team that can flag your account, and no payout schedule that delays your revenue. Your funds go directly to a wallet you control the moment a transaction confirms.
NOWPayments offers a flat rate of 1% + $0.25 per transaction, with no hidden fees or complex pricing structure.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're looking for more ways to monetize your digital content, consider exploring alternative platforms like Patreon or Ko-fi. These services offer unique features and benefits, such as recurring revenue and direct supporter engagement. To learn more about NOWPayments and their Admin Dashboard, check out their GitHub page: https://github.com/unchained-commerce/Shop
Your Action Checklist

To get started with NOWPayments, follow these concrete action steps: 1) Sign up for a NOWPayments account and link your wallet. 2) Get your unique checkout link and share it with your audience. 3) Set up your Admin Dashboard to track your sales and automate your delivery process. 4) Test your payment flow to ensure seamless automation. 5) Focus on creating amazing content for your audience, knowing that you can rely on NOWPayments to handle your payments.
Automation is key to streamlining your sales process and maximizing your revenue.
Admin Dashboard — $29.99. Transaction logs, order management, and real-time analytics. See every order, every payment, every delivery — from anywhere in the world.
